title: JSON schema for a zhmcclient function test case file

generations.description: List of generations for which versions are defined

items.description: A version definition for a specific Z pod generation

generation.description: Z pod generation to which this version applies. If 'any' it applies to all generations

hmc_version.description: HMC M.N version in the Z pod. The default is the HMC version associated with the DC generation of the pod. For example, a DC 3.0 pod has a default HMC version of 2.15. The default HMC versions are defined in hmc_versions in the static.yml file

name.description: Name of the test case as recognized by pytest. Must be unique within the test case file.

description.description: Short description of the test case

no_debug_details.description: If test case debugging is enabled, do not debug details of the testcase

zhmcclient_api_call.description: Definition of the zhmcclient API function to call for the test case, and its input parameters

target.description: Target resource object against which the API method is called. The first item in the list is the actual target object, and the subsequent items are its chain of parent objects, up to the top level resource object.

items.description: One resource object with data for creating it as a zhmcclient object

class.description: Python class name in the zhmcclient namespace of the resource object

name.description: Name of the resource object. Required for non-top-level objects.

properties.description: Properties of the resource object that should be used to create it (as a zhmcclient object)

attribute.description: Name of the attribute on the target object that has the API method to be called. If null or omitted, the target resource object has the method to be called.

method.description: Name of the Python method to be called

parameters.description: Parameters to be passed to the Python method

zhmcclient_api_result.description: Definition of the expected zhmcclient API function result for the test case, and its exceptions and output parameters

return.description: Expected return value, if the method does not raise an exception

exception.description: Expected exception data, if the method raises an exception

class.description: Python class name of the expected exception, without Python module path

message_pattern.description: Regexp pattern for the expected exception message. Begin and end markers must be specified, if they should be considered.

hmc_interactions.description: List of HMC interactions for the test case

items.description: A single HMC interaction with expected HTTP request and HTTP response to be returned

http_request.description: The expected HTTP request, for being checked in the test function

http_response.description: The HTTP response to be returned to the zhmcclient code
